title: Comprehensive MCP tool surface with 12 registered tools
evidence: src/server.ts:63-363 registers find_matches, head_to_head, team_record, standings, top_scoring_teams, season_champion, knockout_bracket, find_players, players_by_club, biggest_wins, overall_stats, seasons_available
suggestion: No action needed — the tool surface covers all required capabilities and adds useful extras (knockout_bracket, seasons_available)

title: Robust team name normalization handles state suffixes and diacritics
evidence: src/normalize.ts:31-65 normalizeTeam strips state codes, descriptors, accents; src/normalize.ts:72-78 keyMatches uses word-level soft containment
suggestion: No action needed — normalization handles the data quality issues documented in TASK.md

title: Data loader caches parsed CSVs per directory for performance
evidence: src/dataLoader.ts:236-246 loadAll uses a Map cache keyed by directory path
suggestion: No action needed — caching avoids redundant disk I/O and parse time
